product_profile.name: Portable Mini Desk Fan with USB-C Charging and 3-Speed Airflow
key_features: quiet motor for office and dorm use
product_profile.key_selling_point: A quiet USB-C rechargeable mini fan for desks, dorms, and commute bags.
product_profile.differentiation_direction: Position around quiet office comfort and portable summer essentials.
product_profile.target_audience: College students and office workers who need personal cooling in small spaces.
product_profile.visual_style: Clean summer colors, bright desk scene, lightweight portable feeling.

image_needs.requirement: White portable mini desk fan with USB-C cable on a clean light blue background, professional product photography, soft side lighting, high detail
Infographic-style product photo showing 3-speed airflow, USB-C charging port, compact size, clean labels, high detail
Lifestyle photo of a young office worker using a mint green mini desk fan beside a laptop in a bright workspace, natural summer light

versions.title: 桌面小风扇真香了
versions.body: 办公室空调总是不均匀，我工位这边经常闷到没精神。最近试了这个 USB-C 充电的小风扇，三档风力够用，放在电脑旁边也不占地方。它声音比较轻，开一档写东西不会被打扰，午休也能用。白色机身看起来很干净，包里放一根充电线就能带走。适合宿舍、工位、通勤包里备一个。

cover.why_this_image: Show the full product clearly for the first screen.
cover.required_if_missing: Provide a clear front or three-quarter real product photo for the cover.

feature.why_this_image: Make the core selling points visible.
feature.required_if_missing: Provide real product detail images that show the key feature.

lifestyle.why_this_image: Create a relatable office use scene.
lifestyle.required_if_missing: Provide a real use-scene photo or a supplier lifestyle image.

publish_result.title: 桌面小风扇真香了
publish_result.next_action: Review the package and publish through the approved operator workflow.
publish_result.policy_note: Publishing readiness package prepared. Actual publishing should follow account status, platform policy, and business approval requirements.
operator_checklist: 确认图片来自真实商品/供应商/用户提供
复核标题、正文、话题和价格表述
按账号状态和平台规范完成发布

faq_list.A_zh: 一档声音比较轻，适合办公室和宿舍使用；高档风力更强，声音会相对明显。
faq_list.A_en: Low speed is quiet for office or dorm use. Higher speed gives stronger airflow with more sound.

faq_list.A_zh: 是的，采用 USB-C 充电，包装内含充电线。
faq_list.A_en: Yes. It uses USB-C charging and includes a charging cable.

sample_replies.reply: 一档声音比较轻，适合办公室和宿舍；如果开到高档，风力更强，声音也会明显一点。

pain_points.pain: Users worry about battery life and charging frequency.
pain_points.typical_quote: 充一次电到底能用多久？
pain_points.fix: Add battery capacity and usage duration to product page.

actions: Put USB-C charging in title and first image

new_insights: Battery life needs to be shown earlier than color options.
loopback.next_selection_adjustment: Prioritize suppliers with documented battery capacity and quieter motor specs.

next_research_seed.recommended_keyword: quiet USB-C rechargeable mini desk fan
next_research_seed.new_target_audience: Office workers and dorm users sensitive to noise and desk space.

stage_progress.Now doing: 选择商品并建立产品事实
stage_progress.Why it matters: 选品先判断商品是否值得继续，避免后续内容空转。

stage_progress.Expected output: 产品画像和 go/no-go 结论。

stage_progress.Why it matters: 使用者需要看到这个商品不只是能写文案，也有经营可行性。
stage_progress.Need from you: 采购价、目标平台和预期毛利。
stage_progress.Expected output: 保守/建议/进取三个价格。

stage_progress.Why it matters: 发布前需要把素材、合规和账号状态整理清楚。
stage_progress.Need from you: 确认账号状态、平台规则和审批要求。
stage_progress.Expected output: 标题、正文、标签、图片顺序和发布前确认清单。

compliance_warnings: 不要标注无法证明的原价或限时折扣。

handoff_summary: product image order and shot list

decision.one_line_reason: Portable Mini Desk Fan with USB-C Charging and 3-Speed Airflow has a clear buyer scenario, but supplier facts, image sources, and compliance details should be confirmed before publishing.

risk_checklist.risk: Supplier and product facts need final verification.
risk_checklist.operator_check: Confirm supplier price, material, package contents, platform restrictions, and after-sales policy.
risk_checklist.copywriting_rule: Do not claim unverified certifications, performance, durability, or effectiveness.
